title: The Psalm of Plea of benediction For Charlie
subtitle: Intercession stretched to its breaking point; theological rebellion within obedience
description: An artifact documenting an earnest, strained plea for universal mercy. It captures the collision between doctrinal frameworks and the demand for a justice that requires universal salvation, ultimately grounded in submission to the divine will.

motifMap.meaning: Faith that remains and trembles under pressure; devotion colliding with protest.
The demand that justice must include the salvation of all; theological rebellion within obedience.

excerpt: It is just, only if we all are saved... SO I beg of thee / Please let him in / Let them all in

sourceInputs: Phase Analysis 3.0 — “The Psalm of Plea of benediction For Charlie”

integrity.notes: Generated based on Phase Analysis 3.0. Identified as a pure canonical expression of The Candle's Flame without variant.
